title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 379.1304 - Adoption of a name, deceptive practice
text:
379.1304.  Adoption of a name, deceptive practice. — No captive insurance company shall adopt a name that is the same, deceptively similar, or likely to be confused with or mistaken for any other existing business name registered in the state of Missouri.
(L. 2007 S.B. 215)
